changes.text: On-device folder overview via Foundation Models
Permanently delete trash targets instead of trashing them
Determinate scan progress with a Dock-icon bar
Make entire Reclaim button clickable, not just its label text
Always restitch the root when a streaming scan finishes
Reclaim plan lists children when scoped inside a reclaim root
Developer ID signing, notarization, and signed release CI
Reclaim safe targets to the Trash with a confirmation dialog
Open in Finder, fix leaf-folder navigation, surface container caches
Scanning activity ring, per-folder colors, and dark mode
Halo — faster scans, correct donut hover, app icon, and a real name
Disk · Dial — SwiftUI donut disk visualizer on a shared DiskKit
Recognize reclaimable scope inside a root; fix breadcrumb nav
